name: documentation_first_state_guide
description: Guide the client through the documentation-first checklist states (session-bootstrap through persist-implementation-records). The wrapper should pass current_state via arguments.current_state. Call with no current_state to get session-bootstrap; call with current_state to get the next record. Terminal state is end_documentation_first (is_end). Legacy end accepted as alias. Other states: session-bootstrap through persist-implementation-records. At terminal, same response when called again. Unknown non-empty states return error. The response includes the selected record fields plus state, guidance, and is_end.

current_state.description: Current state supplied by the wrapper as arguments.current_state. Omit or pass an empty string to receive session-bootstrap. Unknown non-empty states return error.
